idea: Weekly surge in Google Trends search for 'job quitting' signals labor market stress

data.source: Google Trends weekly search interest for 'job quitting'

behavior: A sudden rise in searches for quitting jobs suggests rising labor market stress and potential wage inflation.

market_impact.rationale: Consumer discretionary stocks face margin pressure from rising labor costs.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly search interest increases by 20% week-over-week
trade_logic.exit: After 3 weeks or if interest declines by 10% week-over-week

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Labor unrest and quitting are common and often spike seasonally or with economic changes.

idea: Consumer stress spike from Google Trends search for 'rent increase notice'

data.source: Google Trends weekly search interest for 'rent increase notice'

behavior: Spike in rent increase searches indicates rising consumer cost pressure and potential discretionary spending cutbacks.

market_impact.rationale: Higher housing costs reduce disposable income for discretionary purchases.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly search interest rises by 15% over prior 2 weeks
trade_logic.exit: After 4 weeks or if search interest falls below 5% gain

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Rent-related stress is common and tends to surge around lease renewal seasons.

idea: Weekly jump in political insider filing selling by energy sector insiders

data.source: Political insider filings aggregated weekly for XLE companies

behavior: An unusual spike in insider selling in energy sector signals potential negative near-term outlook or regulatory concerns.

market_impact.rationale: Insider selling often precedes negative sector performance.

trade_logic.entry: If insider selling volume exceeds 150% of 4-week average
trade_logic.exit: After 3 weeks or if selling volume returns below 110% of average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Insider selling activity fluctuates frequently with earnings and regulatory cycles.

idea: Daily spike in freight logistics RSS news count mentioning 'supply chain disruption'

data.source: RSS feed counts for freight logistics news mentioning 'supply chain disruption'

behavior: Sudden surge in supply chain disruption news indicates growing logistics bottlenecks.

market_impact.rationale: Logistics bottlenecks pressure industrial and transportation companies.

trade_logic.entry: If daily news count spikes 50% above 7-day average
trade_logic.exit: After 5 trading days or news count normalizes below 10% over 7-day average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Daily news flow about supply chain issues is volatile and frequently spikes.

idea: Weekly jump in Google Trends search interest for 'car rental deals' indicating travel surge

data.source: Google Trends weekly search interest for 'car rental deals'

behavior: Rising interest in car rentals signals increased travel activity and mobility demand.

market_impact.rationale: Travel-related consumer discretionary firms benefit from rising mobility.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly search interest rises 25% week-over-week
trade_logic.exit: After 3 weeks or search interest falls below 10% gain

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Travel interest regularly surges seasonally and during holiday periods.

idea: Daily rise in Google Trends searches for 'inflation hedge stocks' indicating rising inflation concern

data.source: Google Trends daily search interest for 'inflation hedge stocks'

behavior: Increasing searches for inflation hedges indicate rising market fear of inflation.

market_impact.rationale: Materials sector often benefits as an inflation hedge.

trade_logic.entry: If daily search interest increases 30% above 5-day average
trade_logic.exit: After 7 trading days or if interest drops below 10% above average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Inflation fears and related searches spike frequently with economic data releases.

idea: Weekly surge in local economy weirdness: city-level building permits drop sharply

data.source: Stable public table of weekly city-level building permit counts

behavior: Sharp local drop in building permits signals regional economic cooling.

market_impact.rationale: Real estate sector sensitive to building activity trends.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly permit counts fall 20% below 4-week average for key metro
trade_logic.exit: After 4 weeks or if permit counts recover above 10% of average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Building permits fluctuate regularly with economic cycles and seasonal trends.

idea: Daily jump in open EV charger map counts in a metro area indicating accelerated EV adoption

data.source: OpenChargeMap daily new EV charger counts by metro area

behavior: Spike in new EV chargers suggests accelerated local EV infrastructure deployment.

market_impact.rationale: Consumer discretionary EV-related firms benefit from infrastructure expansion.

trade_logic.entry: If daily new charger count in metro increases 40% above 7-day average
trade_logic.exit: After 7 trading days or if count falls below 10% above average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: EV infrastructure expansions happen frequently in waves and can be detected daily.

idea: Weekly surge in freight logistics Google Trends search for 'rail delays'

data.source: Google Trends weekly search interest for 'rail delays'

behavior: Rising search interest signals growing rail logistics issues impacting supply chains.

market_impact.rationale: Rail delays hurt industrial supply chains and transportation firms.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly search interest is 30% higher than 4-week average
trade_logic.exit: After 3 weeks or interest drops below 10% over average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Rail delay concerns surge regularly with weather and labor conditions.

idea: Weekly increase in Google Trends searches for 'job hiring bonus' indicating labor tightness

data.source: Google Trends weekly search interest for 'job hiring bonus'

behavior: Rising searches for hiring bonuses signal labor shortages and rising recruitment costs.

market_impact.rationale: Higher labor costs pressure consumer discretionary margins.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly search interest rises 20% week-over-week
trade_logic.exit: After 4 weeks or interest falls below 10% gain

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Labor tightness and related searches are frequent and seasonal.

idea: Daily spike in Google Trends searches for 'air freight prices surge'

data.source: Google Trends daily search interest for 'air freight prices surge'

behavior: Increasing concern about air freight prices indicates rising logistics costs and supply chain stress.

market_impact.rationale: Higher freight costs pressure industrial companies and margins.

trade_logic.entry: If daily search interest rises 35% above 7-day average
trade_logic.exit: After 5 trading days or interest drops below 15% above average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Air freight price concerns frequently spike with economic and geopolitical events.

idea: Weekly jump in Google Trends searches for 'energy bill shock' indicating consumer stress

data.source: Google Trends weekly search interest for 'energy bill shock'

behavior: Rising search interest signals consumer anxiety over rising energy costs.

market_impact.rationale: Higher energy bills reduce consumer disposable income affecting staples.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly search interest increases 25% over prior 2 weeks
trade_logic.exit: After 4 weeks or if interest falls below 10% gain

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Energy cost concerns are common and spike with seasonal price moves.

idea: Daily spike in earthquake activity near key logistics hubs indicating potential disruption

data.source: USGS daily earthquake activity near major port hubs

behavior: Short-term surge in local earthquake activity may disrupt freight and logistics flows.

market_impact.rationale: Logistics disruptions harm industrial and transportation sectors.

trade_logic.entry: If daily earthquake count near hub doubles 7-day average
trade_logic.exit: After 5 trading days or activity returns to normal

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Earthquake activity can cluster and cause temporary logistics shocks.

idea: Weekly surge in Google Trends search interest for 'gasoline shortage'

data.source: Google Trends weekly search interest for 'gasoline shortage'

behavior: Spike in gasoline shortage searches signals consumer anxiety about fuel availability and costs.

market_impact.rationale: Energy sector volatility and consumer stress weigh on markets.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly search interest rises 30% above 4-week average
trade_logic.exit: After 3 weeks or interest drops below 15% gain threshold

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Fuel supply concerns tend to spike unpredictably with weather or geopolitical events.

idea: Weekly surge in political insider buying by financial sector executives

data.source: Political insider filings aggregated weekly for XLF companies

behavior: Spike in insider buying signals confidence in financial sector outlook.

market_impact.rationale: Insider buying often precedes positive sector performance.

trade_logic.entry: If insider buying volume exceeds 140% of 4-week average
trade_logic.exit: After 3 weeks or buying volume falls below 110% of average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Financial sector insider activity varies frequently with earnings and macro news.
